understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the current level (BP35) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes and using up to two 50-turn attempts per level, then continue level-by-level until winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after the horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid tile, hits a hazard, or reaches the goal. CLICK targets a specific tile position to interact with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable 'x' blocks to open a fall path—and does not consume moving-platform time when present. Landing on spike tiles ('u'/'v') immediately ends the attempt. UNDO reverts the previous action. The state’s left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan previews indicate where a move will ultimately land and whether a column is a passage to a different y-level, guiding efficient progression.
